message:
fix(demo): correct three issues from scroll-flash fix

1. contain:strict -> contain:size layout style on glow rings/orbs:
   contain:strict includes contain:paint which clips filter:blur()
   bleed, making glow elements lose their soft edges.

2. Add static opacity to glow orbs (0.15 and 0.1): removing the
   opacity animation from keyframes left orbs at opacity:1 instead
   of the original subtle 0.08-0.2 range.

3. Align motion library reveal translateY(32px) -> translateY(20px)
   to match the CSS initial state, avoiding a micro-jump at
   animation start.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
